bottom_line: Workflow ran cleanly. No actionable findings.
coverage_notes: Read all 12 step self-reports (S01-S12). S12 had 2 fix cycles triggered by ENV_DATA_MISSING; both were environmental and correctly classified. No raw run logs available in worktree (ai-dev/logs/ absent), so used self-reports as primary evidence. DB telemetry confirms all gates passed.

xss_safe_filter_abuse.evidence: S02 report explicitly verified no | safe filters on event.message or event.metadata; double-tojson for onclick is XSS-safe per S02 and S05 reviews

tojson_double_encode_confusion.evidence: S01 report documents pattern rationale clearly; S05 review confirmed it matches clipboard.js signature exactly. No agent confusion documented.

env_data_missing_resolved_events.evidence: 2 fix cycles for S12 both classified as ENV_DATA_MISSING (E2E stack not yet provisioned at port 9952); orchestrator resolved by bringing up correct stack. No fixture file needed — events existed in seeded DB.

dashboard_test_regressions.evidence: 47 tests pass in test_auto_merge_routes.py (42 pre-existing + 5 new); S12 browser verification confirmed no regressions in modal or table rendering.
